title: Redone Armor
description: Hand-made No AI diamond and etc texture pack for 1.21+
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b7d818b0e585a8f13873e166b47ff66bb22f791.png)
Retextured Armor is a clean and simple texture pack that refreshes Minecraft’s armor for 1.21+ without drifting away from the vanilla feel most armor sets have been carefully redesigned to look simpler while still fitting perfectly into minecrafts style.
